mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule (sid, did, schedule_date, time_period, total_num, remain_num, price, createtime, updatetime) VALUES (#{sid}, #{did}, #{scheduleDate}, #{timePeriod}, #{totalNum}, #{remainNum}, #{price}, #{createtime}, #{updatetime})
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule SET remain_num = #{num}, updatetime = NOW() WHERE sid = #{sid}
UPDATE schedule SET remain_num = remain_num - 1, updatetime = NOW() WHERE sid = #{sid} AND remain_num > 0
UPDATE schedule SET remain_num = remain_num + 1, updatetime = NOW() WHERE sid = #{sid} AND remain_num < total_num
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM schedule WHERE did = #{did} AND schedule_date = #{date} AND time_period = #{timePeriod}
